title: Raccoon Removal in Bedford Park, Bronx | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Bedford Park, Bronx. Licensed experts serving the Bedford Park area. Same-day service available. Call for a free estimate: $900–$4,000.
intro: Bedford Park residents face unique wildlife challenges due to the neighborhood's proximity to parks and green spaces. Raccoons frequently invade attics, basements, and crawl spaces in the area's multi-family homes and single-family residences. Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane raccoon removal services throughout Bedford Park and surrounding Bronx neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Bedford Park for years with licensed, insured technicians who understand the specific wildlife patterns in this Bronx community. We offer same-day emergency service, humane trapping methods, full exclusion work, and comprehensive cleanup to ensure raccoons don't return to your property.
localContext: Bedford Park's tree-lined streets near the New York Botanical Garden and Lehman College create ideal habitats for raccoons seeking shelter in residential properties. The neighborhood's mix of brick apartment buildings, attached homes, and older construction provides numerous entry points that our technicians expertly seal after removal.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bedford Park typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and necessary repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, cleanup, and prevention measures to keep raccoons from returning.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Bedford Park and the Bronx. Our technicians can typically arrive within 2-4 hours of your call to assess the situation and begin the removal process, especially important if raccoons pose an immediate threat or have entered living spaces.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bedford Park neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are increasingly common in Bedford Park due to proximity to green spaces like the Botanical Garden and Jerome Park Reservoir. They're attracted to garbage, pet food, and the shelter provided by attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces in the area's residential buildings, particularly during spring breeding season and fall when they seek winter dens.

faqs.question: What does your raccoon removal service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, humane live trapping and removal of all raccoons, identification and sealing of entry points, attic or basement cleanup including contaminated insulation removal if needed, sanitization and deodorization, and preventative measures to ensure raccoons cannot re-enter your Bedford Park property.
